list

result.stdout:
generate
  Generate class files from Darwin Core Archive meta data

Usage:
  dwca-codegen [options] generate [<archive>]

Arguments:
  <archive>  Archive zip file name or path to archive folder [default: ]

Options:
  -n, --namespace <namespace>            Namespace of generated source [default: DwC_A]
  -p, --pascalCase                       Use Pascal Case for property and classnames [default: True]
  -t, --termAttribute <index|name|none>  Add Term attribute to properties
  -o, --output <output>                  Path to generated source [default: .]
  -m, --mapMethod                        Include MapRow method [default: False]

commands.payload:
generate
  Generate class files from Darwin Core Archive meta data

Usage:
  dwca-codegen [options] generate [<archive>]

Arguments:
  <archive>  Archive zip file name or path to archive folder [default: ]

Options:
  -n, --namespace <namespace>            Namespace of generated source [default: DwC_A]
  -p, --pascalCase                       Use Pascal Case for property and classnames [default: True]
  -t, --termAttribute <index|name|none>  Add Term attribute to properties
  -o, --output <output>                  Path to generated source [default: .]
  -m, --mapMethod                        Include MapRow method [default: False]
